description: Release-layer label selection for the second expansion wave beyond v2. This extends the fridge-first line with the current Wave 3 long-tail produce labels while still excluding pantry-heavy packaged classes.
notes: This v3 release extends the v2 set with the planned Wave 3 long-tail produce labels.
The selection still excludes pantry-heavy packaged grocery classes and labels missing from the discovery catalog.
The first v3 run should reuse the same pretrained MobileNetV2 baseline so accuracy shifts mainly reflect the wider label set.
